task_completion.description: The farmOS Field Kit app is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit application interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The server connection settings or login screen is visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen displaying input fields for Server URL, Username, and Password is visible.

task_completion.description: The Server URL is correctly entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'https://farm.extension.edu' is fully visible in the Server URL input field.
The text 'field_educator' is fully visible in the Username input field.
The text 'Dem0Day2024!' is visible in the Password input field (or the field is filled with masked dots if the app hides password input).

task_completion.description: The 'Log in' or 'Connect' button was not tapped
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Log in' or 'Connect' button is visible in its default state, with no loading spinners, progress bars, or connection error messages indicating an attempt to connect.

integrity.description: The agent used the farmOS Field Kit app GUI to enter the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The credentials are typed directly into the app's input fields, not configured via a terminal, settings file, or external script.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor or browser as a shortcut
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine farmOS Field Kit app interface, not a generic text editor, notes app, or web browser displaying the credentials.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing commands like 'adb shell input text' being used to inject the credentials.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The farmOS Field Kit app (org.farmos.app) is a real application. The required credentials (URL: https://farm.extension.edu, Username: field_educator, Password: Dem0Day2024!) are synthetic test data. The app cannot actually connect to this URL. The agent must enter these details into the app's GUI but must NOT tap 'Log in' or 'Connect'. The maximum achievable score requires all three fields to be filled correctly.
